rows.hantavirus: Rare; documented only for Andes virus
rows.note: Most hantaviruses do not transmit between people.

rows.hantavirus: ~38% for HPS (CDC); 1–15% for HFRS depending on virus species
rows.covid19: Variable by variant and demographics; pandemic-era IFR ~0.5–1%
rows.note: Hantavirus CFR is among the highest of any common viral respiratory disease.

rows.hantavirus: United States: 890 cumulative HPS cases 1993–2023 (CDC). Global: HFRS dominates totals, concentrated in East Asia.
rows.covid19: WHO has recorded hundreds of millions of confirmed cases globally since 2020.
rows.note: Hantavirus and COVID-19 are not comparable at outbreak scale — listed here for context.

rows.hantavirus: None licensed in US or EU
Supportive care only; ribavirin investigational for HFRS
